name: python3-distlib
title: python3-distlib
description:
low-level components of python distutils2/packaging
Distlib is a library which implements low-level functions that relate to
packaging and distribution of Python software. It is intended to be used
as the basis for third-party packaging tools.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-distlib because low-level components of python distutils2/packaging.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-distlib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-distlib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-distlib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
